procedures.name: Orthotopic liver transplant (deceased donor)
procedures.notes: Deceased-donor orthotopic liver transplant after completed evaluation and sustained sobriety.

procedures.name: Tunneled pleural drainage catheter (PleurX) placement, right
procedures.notes: Placed for recurrent symptomatic right hepatic hydrothorax. (She subsequently improved markedly and ultimately required little drainage.)

procedures.name: Outpatient thoracentesis + paracentesis (community radiology)
procedures.notes: Weekly therapeutic drainage. Per local protocol for INR 2.0: 4 units FFP + 8 g albumin/L administered peri-procedurally. No procedural bleeding.

procedures.name: Outpatient thoracentesis + paracentesis (community radiology)
procedures.notes: Weekly therapeutic drainage. Per local protocol for INR 2.0: 4 units FFP + 8 g albumin/L administered peri-procedurally. No procedural bleeding.

procedures.name: Outpatient thoracentesis + paracentesis (community radiology)
procedures.notes: Weekly therapeutic drainage. Per local protocol for INR 2.0: 4 units FFP + 8 g albumin/L administered peri-procedurally. No procedural bleeding.

procedures.name: Outpatient thoracentesis + paracentesis (community radiology)
procedures.notes: Weekly therapeutic drainage. Per local protocol for INR 2.0: 4 units FFP + 8 g albumin/L administered peri-procedurally. No procedural bleeding.

procedures.name: Outpatient thoracentesis + paracentesis (community radiology)
procedures.notes: First weekly outpatient session after referral. Per local protocol for INR 2.0: 4 units FFP + 8 g albumin/L administered peri-procedurally. No procedural bleeding.

procedures.name: Therapeutic thoracentesis, right
procedures.notes: 1.3 L of serous transudative fluid removed from the right pleural space. Ultrasound-guided. No blood products given. No bleeding complication. Breathing improved to baseline.

procedures.name: Large-volume therapeutic paracentesis
procedures.notes: 6.5 L of ascitic fluid removed; 8 g albumin per liter given for large-volume paracentesis. Ascitic fluid: SAAG >1.1, PMN <250 (no SBP). No FFP/platelets given. No bleeding complication. Abdomen returned to baseline.
